text:
Kenji Hatakawa is a Heavens Arena commentator and an anime-only character in the 1999 anime adaptation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 40 (1999) 

Appearance

Kenji wears a light-colored sweater with two orange lines that divide the sleeves over a white dress shirt. He has fair brown colored hair that's parted to the right, brown eyes, and wears a pair of rectangular-shaped glasses.

Personality

Kenji has a cheerful and insightful demeanor. 

Plot

Heavens Arena arc

Kenji acts, on TV, as the commentator for the match between Hisoka and Kastro in the Heavens Arena.
